welcome_offer.description: Earn 60,000 AAdvantage bonus miles after spending $4,000 in first 3 months

earning_rates.notes: Earn 4 AAdvantage miles per $1 on American Airlines purchases
Earn 3 AAdvantage miles per $1 at restaurants
Earn 3 AAdvantage miles per $1 at hotels (booked directly with hotel or through aa.com)
Earn 2 AAdvantage miles per $1 on other eligible travel
Earn 1 AAdvantage mile per $1 on all other purchases

annual_credits.name: Air Travel Credit
annual_credits.description: $150 credit annually toward air travel charged to the card

other_benefits.name: Free Checked Bag
other_benefits.description: First checked bag free for cardholder and up to 8 companions on domestic AA flights

other_benefits.name: Priority Boarding
other_benefits.description: Priority boarding on American Airlines flights

other_benefits.name: 10% AAdvantage Miles Redemption Bonus
other_benefits.description: 10% back on AAdvantage miles redeemed for award flights
